repair_candidate.summary: Continue repair on contributor PR #87560. The branch is narrow, maintainer_can_modify=true, and the earlier failing checks-node-auto-reply-core-top-level lane is now green on repaired head e020fbf6776e06378aeb0c240122ca4df49349ad. The remaining gate is a fresh Codex /review clean pass on that repaired head before any merge-capable run can reconsider the PR.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): repair RTL outbound isolation checks
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Continue the repair of contributor PR #87560 instead of opening a replacement branch.
- Keep the shared RTL isolation helper and outbound assistant-visible delivery sanitizer focused on Hebrew/Arabic/RTL line isolation.
- Run a fresh Codex /review on repaired head e020fbf6776e06378aeb0c240122ca4df49349ad and address any findings before merge reconsideration.

## Source and Credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87560 by Pluviobyte.
- Related issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/68105.
- Clownfish should preserve attribution in the PR trail and release-note context.

## Verification
- pnpm test src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.test.ts src/shared/text/rtl-isolation.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Fresh Codex /review clean pass on the repaired head before merge-capable finalization.

## Current Evidence
- Preflight main: 70489061cab62786b794ac593f85933b3ade2063.
- PR #87560 head: e020fbf6776e06378aeb0c240122ca4df49349ad.
- Hydrated checks show checks-node-auto-reply-core-top-level is now SUCCESS and changed-surface CI is broadly green.
- Merge is intentionally out of scope for this job.
credit_notes: Preserve attribution for Pluviobyte as the original author of source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87560.
Keep PR #87560 as the canonical lane rather than opening a replacement PR unless the branch becomes uneditable or unsafe.
Release-note context should credit the original RTL outbound isolation contribution if this user-visible message-delivery fix lands.
